allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(i['from_linter'],'|',i['pos']['filename']+':'+str\(i['pos']['line']\),'|',i['text']\) for i in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['Issues']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i\) for i in d.keys\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; issues=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['Issues']; [print\(i.get\('FromLinter','?'\),'|',i.get\('Pos',{}\).get\('Filename','?'\)+':'+str\(i.get\('Pos',{}\).get\('Line','?'\)\),'|',i.get\('Text','?'\)\) for i in issues]")
